message:
🐛 Fix broken Helm install and add analytics to /from-lens page (#2260)

The Helm install command pointed to a non-existent OCI registry URL
(oci://ghcr.io/kubestellar/console/chart). Updated to use the correct
gh-pages chart repo (helm repo add + helm install). Also added GA4
and Umami analytics tracking (pageview + CTA clicks) so we can
measure conversion from the landing page.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
